_note: Estimated — run `cargo bench` for real numbers on your hardware.

benchmarks.note: Bottleneck: Mutex acquisition + HashMap insert. No I/O.
HashMap lookup is O(1); slightly faster than SET due to no allocation.

benchmarks.metric: Real Redis GET (same hardware, same key pattern)
benchmarks.note: Redis overhead: RESP parser + epoll event loop + jemalloc. Our overhead: RESP parser + std Mutex.
O(n) scan over the map. Acceptable up to ~50k keys; use linked-list LRU beyond that.
serde_json serialize + write to OS page cache. No fsync (appendfsync=everysec semantics).
Sequential JSON reads from SSD. 100k keys replayed in ~240ms.
